name: dependency-guardian
title: Dependency Guardian
summary: Evaluate dependency updates from external policy evidence and prepare reviewable changes without merging them.

inputs.name: evaluation_url
inputs.description: Trusted endpoint returning dependency policy status/evidence.

schedule.rationale: Evaluate each newly proposed dependency change.

evidence.name: dependency-policy
evidence.description: Version, provenance, vulnerability, license, and test policy result.

expected_artifacts.name: run-journal
expected_artifacts.description: Durable execution and effect audit trail.

safety.rationale: The agent may prepare a change but must never merge, publish, or bypass policy.
safety.secrets: Credentials belong in the environment; evidence and reports must be redacted.
